C:\Qt\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir/objects.a
E:\softwares\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\softwares\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o StudentTopicSystemServer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libStudentTopicSystemServer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
